The '''Tetan Corsair''' was a warship in the fleet of the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]].

==History==
During the [[Krath Holy Crusade]], a Corsair deployed a number of [[Escape pod/Legends|pods]] full of [[Krath war droid/Legends|Krath war droids]] to [[Deneba/Legends|Deneba]] to [[Battle of Deneba|attack]] the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]] {{1st}}
